title: Pattern Discovery Path
description: Build fluency in Pattern Discovery inside Learning Paradigms by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Unsupervised Learning
steps.summary: Unsupervised Learning belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Pattern Discovery. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Pattern Discovery. Start after Q-Learning and V-Learning. It opens into probabilistic unsupervised learning and Unsupervised Representation Learning.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: probabilistic unsupervised learning
steps.summary: probabilistic unsupervised learning belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Pattern Discovery. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Pattern Discovery. Start after Unsupervised Learning and Q-Learning.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Unsupervised Data Augmentation (UDA)
steps.summary: Unsupervised Data Augmentation (UDA) belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Pattern Discovery. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Pattern Discovery. Start after Data Augmentation and Augmentation.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: unsupervised fine-tuning
steps.summary: unsupervised fine-tuning belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Pattern Discovery. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Pattern Discovery. Start after Fine Tuning and P-Tuning.

steps.title: Unsupervised Dependency Parsing
steps.summary: Unsupervised Dependency Parsing belongs to the Learning Paradigms area of AI/ML, within Pattern Discovery. It sits inside Learning Paradigms / Pattern Discovery. Start after Dependency Parsing and A* Parsing.
